external.description: The On-Ramp program is designed for PowerShell beginners and newcomers to the DevOps community. Get extra support and dedicated learning tracks.
external.title: On-Ramp Program | PowerShell + DevOps Global Summit

record.text:
New to PowerShell? New to tech conferences? 💭

The On-Ramp Program is made for YOU. 🫵 

Get a dedicated beginner track, curated sessions, AND a Summit Buddy to guide you through the week. 🙌

Only 40 spots available — APPLY TODAY! 

🔗 www.powershellsummit.org/on-ramp/
